Name: sapdme_psp
Title: Problem-Solving Process
ShortText: Allows you to create, read, and update problem-solving processes in SAP Digital Manufacturing for Issue Resolution
Description: A problem-solving process is created in reference to a specific defect. You define containment actions, identify root causes, and specify corrective and preventive measures for a problem-solving process, using either the standard 8D methodology or a custom methodology.
